subject: docs(claude): sync new sections from external glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Fetched latest from devmade-ai/glow-props/main/CLAUDE.md and synced
new content into this project's CLAUDE.md:

- Triggers section: 10 analysis triggers (review, audit, docs, mobile,
  clean, performance, security, debug, improve, start) with behavior
  rules and sequential sweep protocol
- AI Note: Claude Code mobile/web sibling repo access via GitHub API
- Prohibition: interactive input prompts / selection UIs
- Suggested Implementation: Download as PDF via window.print()
- SVG design rules: 400 DPI rasterization, shape-rendering attribute

Tags: docs, claude, sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: claude-config
Semver: patch
title: sync new sections from external glow-props CLAUDE.md
